THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEENEY, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 16TH ST, #304, STAYED UNTIL MAY-04-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY PLTF. MAY HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $400.00; PLTF. MAY APPLY FOR A WRIT ON 5/2/95; PLTF. AGREES NOT TO ENTER DEFTS' ROOM WITHOUT 24 HR. NOTICE; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
